title: UOM
content:
术语: UOM
缩写: Unit of Measurement

title: BOM
content:
术语: BOM
缩写: Bill of Material

title: EAN
content:
术语: EAN
缩写: European Article Number

title: PLU
content:
术语: PLU
解释: Weight artilce's barcode, use to record weight,price in one code. Our system can scan it and parse weight, price information from it.

title: Value Pack
content:
术语: Value Pack
解释: Similar to bundle. The value pack is processed in the warehouse and delivered to the store. It's a Value pack.

title: Bundle
content:
术语: Bundle
解释: Package several articles to one article with BOM relationship in the store

title: Sale Set
content:
术语: Sale Set
解释: Sub scenario of Value Pack, one item with one freebie called Sale Set.

title: PO
content:
术语: PO
缩写: Purchase Order
解释: Receiving goods from suppliers

title: RPO
content:
术语: RPO
缩写: Return Purchase Order
解释: Return goods to suppliers

title: IBT
content:
术语: IBT
缩写: Inter branch transfer
解释: One store transfers articles to the other stores

title: BST
content:
术语: BST
解释: Dc to store

title: STO
content:
术语: STO
解释: Stock Transport Order

title: GR
content:
术语: GR
缩写: Goods Receipt
解释: DMall post order to SAP and SAP response GR to DMALL

title: MR
content:
术语: MR
缩写: Merchandise Return

title: FM
content:
术语: FM
缩写: Function Module

title: ROR
content:
术语: ROR
缩写: Return Order Request

title: RTV
content:
术语: RTV
缩写: Return to Vendor

title: Consignment without stock
content:
术语: Consignment without stock
解释: Vendor delivers goods to store for sale, but SM supermaket dosen't manage inventory

title: ISP
content:
术语: ISP
缩写: In-store POS server

title: Term-Z
content:
术语: Term-Z
解释: Term-Z is the daily settlement. It will print receipt which shows sale amount during this period.Term-Z can be done many times in one day. Every Term-Z will calculate the sale amount from now to last Term-Z.

title: X-Reading
content:
术语: X-Reading
解释: X-reading is when cashier A pre-comimt , the POS will prints X-reading to record his sales information.

title: Y-reading
content:
术语: Y-reading
解释: Y-reading is the sales amount in one POS from 0 am to now time.

title: Z-reading
content:
术语: Z-reading
解释: Z-reading is record whole day sales information. That means after Term-Z, the printer will print a Z-reading receipt. After that , this POS cannot do transactions in that day.

title: PCA
content:
术语: PCA
缩写: Price Change

title: MR
content:
术语: MR
缩写: Merchandise Return

title: DTI
content:
术语: DTI
缩写: Department of Trade and Industry
解释: Executive department of the Philippine government responsible for the advancement, promotion, governance, regulation, management and growth of industry and trade.

title: TP
content:
术语: TP
缩写: Transfer Posting

title: GI
content:
术语: GI
缩写: Goods Issuance

title: Pull obd Order
content:
术语: Pull obd Order
缩写: Pull obd (outbound delivey) Order
解释: Integration task wherein the system pulls the Delivery Note (obd) from SAP to DMall

title: MAV
content:
术语: MAV
缩写: Moving Average Price

title: DSA
content: 术语: DSA

title: SOH
content:
术语: SOH
缩写: Stock on hand
解释: Actual item in store
